messages.content: 翻译"无损检测方法借助声学和光学的发展，通过测量材料的物理性能来计算出残余应力。"用地道的英语
Nondestructive testing methods utilize the advancements in acoustics and optics to calculate residual stress by measuring the material's physical properties.
翻译"Vidler 等使用中子衍射法对G350钢进行多次残余应力测量，将测得的残余应力用于评估高周疲劳损伤。"用地道的英语
Vidler et al. utilized neutron diffraction method to measure residual stress multiple times on G350 steel, and used the measured residual stress to assess high cycle fatigue damage.
翻译"Betsofen 等通过X射线衍射研究了薄板奥氏体-马氏体VNS9-Sh TRIP钢的相组成，并测量了钢中的残余应力，发现不同组织的残余拉应力有所不同，从而可以根据残余应力的大小区别固溶体的成分。"用地道的英语

Betsofen et al. investigated the phase composition of thin sheet austenite-martensite VNS9-Sh TRIP steel through X-ray diffraction and measured the residual stress in the steel. They discovered that residual tensile stress varied among different microstructures, thus allowing differentiation of the solute composition based on the magnitude of residual stress.

翻译"随着各种物理原理的发展，残余应力测量技术不断得到改进，同时新的理论出现，也推动着残余应力测量准确性与效率的提升。针对模锻件残余应力场的测量问题，由于模锻工艺与材料几何的复杂性，目前残余应力测量技术难以实现模锻件全局应力场的在线准确测量，一般采用模锻件样本测量值去估计其他模锻件的残余应力场，然而不同模锻件的残余应力场存在较大差异，导致加工变形预测存在较大偏差。因此一种准确高效的模锻件的残余应力场在线测量技术亟待突破。"用地道的英语

With the development of various physical principles, the measurement techniques for residual stress have been continuously improved. Simultaneously, new theories have emerged, further enhancing the accuracy and efficiency of residual stress measurement. Regarding the measurement of residual stress fields in forged components, due to the complexity of forging processes and material geometries, it is currently challenging to achieve online and accurate measurement of the global stress field in forged components. Typically, the residual stress field of other forged components is estimated based on the measured values from sample test pieces. However, significant differences exist in the residual stress fields of different forged components, resulting in significant deviations in deformation prediction. Therefore, an accurate and efficient online measurement technique for residual stress fields in forged components is urgently needed.
翻译"近年，科研工作者通过研究残余应力的分布规律，建立整体残余应力场与宏观监测数据之间的关系，从而根据加工过程监测的数据在线推断出加工零件的残余应力场。"用地道的英语

In recent years, researchers have studied the distribution patterns of residual stress and established the relationship between the overall residual stress field and macroscopic monitoring data. As a result, they can infer the residual stress field of manufactured parts based on the monitored data obtained during the processing.
翻译"近年，科研工作者通过研究残余应力的分布规律，建立整体残余应力场与监测数据之间的关系，进而根据加工过程监测的数据在线推断出加工零件的残余应力场。"用地道的英语

In recent years, researchers have been studying the distribution patterns of residual stress and establishing the relationship between the overall residual stress field and monitoring data. Consequently, they can infer the residual stress field of manufactured parts based on the online monitoring data obtained during the processing.
翻译"Wang 等提出了一种将监测数据与机理模型相结合的初始残余应力推断方法，该方法将加工过程中的监测数据作为不平衡残余应力的宏观表征，并基于有限元软件建立了变形力与残余应力之间的机理模型，引入策略梯度法解决学习模型与机理模型相结合的梯度下降问题，从而迭代推断出初始残余应力场。"用地道的英语

Wang et al. proposed a method for inferring initial residual stress by combining monitoring data with a mechanistic model. This method uses the monitored data during the manufacturing process as a macroscopic characterization of unbalanced residual stress. Additionally, a mechanistic model was established based on finite element software to correlate deformation forces with residual stress. They introduced a strategy gradient method to address the gradient descent problem associated with combining the learning model and mechanistic model, thus iteratively inferring the initial residual stress field.
翻译"Wang 等提出了一种将监测数据与机理模型相结合的初始残余应力推断方法，该方法将加工过程中的监测数据作为不平衡残余应力的宏观表征，并基于有限元软件建立了变形力与残余应力之间的机理模型。最终结合加工过程中的监测数据与机理模型推断出毛坯内部的初始残余应力场。"用地道的英语

Wang et al. proposed a method for inferring initial residual stress by combining monitoring data with a mechanistic model. This method utilizes the monitored data during the manufacturing process as a macroscopic representation of unbalanced residual stress and establishes a mechanistic model correlating deformation forces with residual stress based on finite element software. By integrating the monitored data and mechanistic model from the manufacturing process, the method finally infers the initial residual stress field within the raw material.
翻译"Hu 等将加工过程中监测的变形力作为观测量，在贝叶斯框架中，实现对毛坯内部初始残余应力场的推断。方法中将高斯过程作为先验以缩小解空间，并使用马尔科夫链蒙特卡洛法求解后验分布，保证了残余应力场的推断的准确性"用地道的英语

Hu et al. utilized the monitored deformation forces during the manufacturing process as observables to infer the initial residual stress field within the raw material within a Bayesian framework. In this method, a Gaussian process was employed as a prior to narrow down the solution space, and the posterior distribution was obtained using Markov chain Monte Carlo method, ensuring the accuracy of the residual stress field inference.
